description: This file defines a FastAPI backend API for the Task Organizer Pro application, implementing endpoints for health checks, authentication (signup, login), and CRUD operations for tasks with filtering and sorting options. It uses dependency injection and modules for database interaction, security, and data models.

methods.name: health_check()
methods.description: Health check endpoint returning service status.

methods.name: auth_docs()
methods.description: Returns instructions for using JWT authentication.

methods.name: signup(payload: SignUpRequest, conn=Depends(get_conn))
methods.description: Registers a new user, ensuring email uniqueness.

methods.name: login(payload: LoginRequest, conn=Depends(get_conn))
methods.description: Authenticates user and issues a JWT token.

methods.name: list_tasks( response: Response, q: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Full-text search query (title+description)."), status_: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="status", description="Filter by status: todo|in_progress|done."), priority: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by priority: low|medium|high."), due_from: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Due date >= (YYYY-MM-DD)."), due_to: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Due date <= (YYYY-MM-DD)."), sort: str = Query("created_at", description="Sort field: created_at|updated_at|due_date|priority|status|title."), order: str = Query("desc", description="Sort order: asc|desc."), limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200, description="Page size."), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0, description="Offset for pagination."), user=Depends(get_current_user), conn=Depends(get_conn), )
methods.description: Lists tasks for the current user with optional filters, sorting, and pagination.

methods.name: create_task(payload: TaskCreateRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), conn=Depends(get_conn))
methods.description: Creates a new task for the authenticated user.

methods.name: get_task(task_id: str, user=Depends(get_current_user), conn=Depends(get_conn))
methods.description: Retrieves a specific task by ID for the current user.

methods.name: update_task(task_id: str, payload: TaskUpdateRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), conn=Depends(get_conn))
methods.description: Updates fields of a specific task.

ctags.name: list_tasks
ctags.signature: ( response: Response, q: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Full-text search query (title+description)."), status_: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="status", description="Filter by status: todo|in_progress|done."), priority: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by priority: low|medium|high."), due_from: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Due date >= (YYYY-MM-DD)."), due_to: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Due date <= (YYYY-MM-DD)."), sort: str = Query("created_at", description="Sort field: created_at|updated_at|due_date|priority|status|title."), order: str = Query("desc", description="Sort order: asc|desc."), limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200, description="Page size."), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0, description="Offset for pagination."), user=Depends(get_current_user), conn=Depends(get_conn), )

ctags.name: update_task
ctags.pattern: /^def update_task(task_id: str, payload: TaskUpdateRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), conn=D/
